payload.answer: Compiled email context into memory candidates: Sam joined Point72 last month and requested the AI infra article.
citations: From: sam@example.com Subject: Follow up. Great seeing you. Yes, I joined Point72 last month. Please send the AI infra article.

memory_cards.statement: Sam asked to be sent the AI infra article.

details: Committed durable employment update with medium confidence due to relative date 'last month' lacking an absolute email date.
Captured follow-up request as actionable context.
